name: io.github.heidihelena/citevahti
title: CiteVahti
description: Runs unit tests on manuscript citations: checks whether each cited source supports the claim it backs. Blinded human-first workflow (the human rates first; the AI second rating is revealed afterward; the human decides), hash-chained audit trail, decision-gated undoable Zotero write-back. Local-first: manuscripts and ratings stay on the user's machine.
